evfuse 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Spatial Data Fusion for Extreme Sea Levels

Load and validate sea level data

Source: R/data.R
load_data.Rd

Reads a data frame with columns: lon, lat, location, year, max_sea_level, data_source. Validates required columns and types, then returns a structured list ready for stage-1 GEV fitting.

Usage

load_data(df, source_params = list(NOAA = 1:3, ADCIRC = 4:6))

Arguments

df

A data frame with the required columns.

source_params

Named list mapping data source labels to parameter indices in the joint model. Default: list(NOAA = 1:3, ADCIRC = 4:6).

Value

An evfuse_data list with components:

sites

Data frame of unique sites with lon, lat, location, data_source.

maxima

Named list of numeric vectors of annual maxima, keyed by location.

n_noaa

Number of NOAA sites.

n_adcirc

Number of ADCIRC sites.

n_sites

Total number of sites.

source_params

The source-to-parameter mapping.

p

Total number of parameters per site in the joint model.

On this page
